name: Threads Engagement
description: Find and engage with relevant Threads posts using AI-powered filtering and reply drafting
author: Continuity Team

settings.label: Threads Access Token
settings.description: Long-lived Threads API access token (60 days). Get one from Meta Developer Console.

settings.label: Threads User ID
settings.description: Your Threads numeric user ID (returned during OAuth flow)

settings.label: Search Keywords
settings.description: Comma-separated topics to search for (e.g., 'AI agents, developer tools, startup growth')

settings.label: Persona Description
settings.description: Describe your voice and brand for AI filtering and reply drafting (e.g., 'Founder of an AI dev tools startup. Friendly, technical, insightful.')

settings.label: Relevance Threshold (1-10)
settings.description: Minimum AI relevance score to include a post (default: 6)

settings.label: Search Interval (hours)
settings.description: How often to search Threads for new posts (default: 12)

settings.label: Max Searches Per Run
settings.description: Number of keyword searches per cron run (default: 5). Budget: 500/week total.
